case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. BAUER'S CALIFORNIA COACH SALES AND SERVICE, INC., et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUER'S CALIFORNIA COACH SALES AND SERVICE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA BAUER LIMOUSINE AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: SEE TEXT,, APPROX. 36,371 SQ FT OF SHED SPACE, 1,393 SQ FT OF OFFICE SPACE, 245 SQ FT OF STORAGE & RESTROOM SPACE, AND 2,596 SQ FT OF PAVED YARD SPACE LOCATED AT PIER 27, IN S.F. CA. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BAUER'S CALIFORNIA COACH SALES AND SERVICE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA BAUER LIMOUSINE AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICE DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT BAUER'S CALIFORNIA COACH SALES AND SERVICE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA BAUER LIMOUSINE AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICE
